description: Long-form conversations on AI, health, culture, and ideas. A fictional demo source for the AFO spec.
recommended_prompts: What episodes from the last 30 days are most relevant to my interests?
Summarize the latest episode in under 5 bullet points.
Compare episodes 99–101 on the theme of AI and human creativity.
Make me a 10-minute briefing on the last 3 episodes.

trust_hints.sponsored_disclosure: Episodes may include host-read ads; these are clearly labeled in episode descriptions.
